'''janazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumoencephalogram|pneumoencephalogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumoencephalogram|pneumoencephalogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| janazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jænæzhæth|jænæzhæth]] || [[word:jænæzhæj|jænæzhæj]] || [[word:jænæzhæsh|jænæzhæsh]] || [[word:jænæzhæ|jænæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jananazhath|jananazhath]] || [[word:jananazhaj|jananazhaj]] || [[word:jananazhash|jananazhash]] || [[word:jananazha|jananazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:janazhath|janazhath]] || [[word:janazhaj|janazhaj]] || [[word:janazhash|janazhash]] || [[word:janazha|janazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:janafzhath|janafzhath]] || [[word:janafzhaj|janafzhaj]] || [[word:janafzhash|janafzhash]] || [[word:janafzhaf|janafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:janazhatha|janazhatha]] || [[word:janazhaja|janazhaja]] || [[word:janazhasha|janazhasha]] || [[word:janazhaka|janazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:janazhath|janazhath]] || [[word:janazhaj|janazhaj]] || [[word:janazhash|janazhash]] || [[word:janazha|janazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:janazhathal|janazhathal]] || [[word:janazhajal|janazhajal]] || [[word:janazhashal|janazhashal]] || [[word:janazhakal|janazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:janazhathatha|janazhathatha]] || [[word:janazhajaja|janazhajaja]] || [[word:janazhashasha|janazhashasha]] || [[word:janazhaka|janazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:janazhathan|janazhathan]] || [[word:janazhajan|janazhajan]] || [[word:janazhashan|janazhashan]] || [[word:janazhakan|janazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:janazhathaoro|janazhathaoro]] || [[word:janazhajaoro|janazhajaoro]] || [[word:janazhashaoro|janazhashaoro]] || [[word:janazhakaoro|janazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
